speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I would not by my will have troubled you,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: But, since you make your pleasure of your pains,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I will no further chide you.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I could not stay behind you. My desire,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: More sharp than filèd steel, did spur me forth;

speaker: ANTONIO
text: And not all love to see you, though so much

speaker: ANTONIO
text: As might have drawn one to a longer voyage,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: But jealousy what might befall your travel,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Being skill-less in these parts, which to a stranger,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Unguided and unfriended, often prove

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Rough and unhospitable. My willing love,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: The rather by these arguments of fear,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Set forth in your pursuit.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: My kind Antonio,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I can no other answer make but thanks,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: And thanks, and ever thanks; and oft good turns

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Are shuffled off with such uncurrent pay.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: But were my worth, as is my conscience, firm,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: You should find better dealing. What’s to do?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Shall we go see the relics of this town?

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Tomorrow, sir. Best first go see your lodging.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I am not weary, and ’tis long to night.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I pray you, let us satisfy our eyes

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: With the memorials and the things of fame

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: That do renown this city.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Would you’d pardon me.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I do not without danger walk these streets.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Once in a sea fight ’gainst the Count his galleys

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I did some service, of such note indeed

speaker: ANTONIO
text: That were I ta’en here it would scarce be answered.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Belike you slew great number of his people?

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Th’ offense is not of such a bloody nature,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Albeit the quality of the time and quarrel

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Might well have given us bloody argument.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: It might have since been answered in repaying

speaker: ANTONIO
text: What we took from them, which, for traffic’s sake,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Most of our city did. Only myself stood out,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: For which, if I be lapsèd in this place,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I shall pay dear.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Do not then walk too open.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: It doth not fit me. Hold, sir, here’s my purse.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: In the south suburbs, at the Elephant,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Is best to lodge. I will bespeak our diet

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Whiles you beguile the time and feed your knowledge

speaker: ANTONIO
text: With viewing of the town. There shall you have me.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Why I your purse?

speaker: ANTONIO
text: Haply your eye shall light upon some toy

speaker: ANTONIO
text: You have desire to purchase, and your store,

speaker: ANTONIO
text: I think, is not for idle markets, sir.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I’ll be your purse-bearer and leave you

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: For an hour.

speaker: ANTONIO
text: To th’ Elephant.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I do remember.
